---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug in Ambatukam Go
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Reproduction

Minimal code or steps to reproduce the behavior:

```go
// your code here
```

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include any error messages, stack traces, or
unexpected output.

## Environment

- Go version: (e.g. `go version`)
- OS / architecture:
- Ambatukam Go version: (e.g. `v0.1.0`, or commit SHA if `HEAD`)

## Additional Context

Any other relevant information, links, or screenshots.
